title: chrysopogon filipes
intro: Chrysopogon filipes, also known as Vetiver or Khus, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Chrysopogon filipes include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Chrysopogon filipes can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and powders, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and dietary supplements.
